title: Property Consultant - Hiranandani Group Ventures Solutions - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Hiranandani Group Ventures Solutions - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
We at Hiranandani Group Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Navi Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Hiranandani Group Ventures Solutions:
Hiranandani Group Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hiranandani Group Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
